codeReview.summary: Test file has correct structure and covers all 9 VAL-HIST assertions, but VAL-HIST-008 test is misnamed/misimplemented - it does NOT test direct URL access, it just clicks through the UI like VAL-HIST-003. Additionally, the test appears to have been truncated to 285 lines instead of the full implementation shown in the transcript.

issues.description: VAL-HIST-008 'Direct URL access to session works' does NOT actually test direct URL access. It clicks on session link from history list (lines 244-252) instead of using page.goto() to navigate directly to /history/{sessionId}. The validation contract explicitly states 'Navigating directly to /history/{sessionId} for valid session shows detail' with evidence being a screenshot. The current implementation is identical to VAL-HIST-003 which tests click navigation. This test fails to verify the actual requirement.

Test file appears truncated to 285 lines based on git diff output. The transcript skeleton shows the full file creation with content including all test cases, but the actual committed file is significantly shorter and missing proper implementation of VAL-HIST-008 and other test sections.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md explicitly states 'Do not modify production code - only add tests'. The test file has proper structure following existing patterns (test-db-helpers, smoke tests), so this convention was followed.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: e2e/history-comprehensive.spec.ts imports from './test-db-helpers' and uses same helper function patterns as auth-comprehensive.spec.ts and session-core-comprehensive.spec.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: The e2e-worker skill was invoked but the transcript shows the worker primarily used agent-browser and read tools to understand existing patterns. The skill procedure for comprehensive testing wasn't explicitly followed - instead the worker adapted from existing smoke tests.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript shows invocation of e2e-worker skill but transcript shows limited skill output, with worker primarily reading existing test files to understand patterns

summary: The e2e-history-comprehensive test file was created and committed. However, the test is marked as FAIL because VAL-HIST-008 is misimplemented - it claims to test 'direct URL access' but actually just clicks through the UI like VAL-HIST-003, not using page.goto() to navigate directly to /history/{sessionId}. The validation contract explicitly requires direct URL navigation with evidence being a screenshot. Additionally, the file appears truncated based on the git diff output showing only 285 lines vs the full 424-line implementation shown in the transcript.
